chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Pett. No.D-762 of 2025 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Hearing of case (priority) 1. For orders on office objections at flag ‘A’ 2. For orders on CMA No.3425/2025 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 13.10.2025 Petitioner Mst. Zahida Parveen present in-person Mr. Miran Bux Shar, Advocate for respondents-Municipal Committee Khairpur Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General along with Nadeem Ahmed Mangi, Jr. Clerk Municipal Committee Khairpur ************** Counsel for the respondents, Municipal Committee Khairpur, has filed para-wise comments, same are taken on record. Upon perusal of the comments, it is evident that the allotment made in favor of the petitioner under an allotment order is fake and bogus. Under such circumstances, the matter requires evidence; however, the same cannot be examined while invoking the constitutional jurisdiction under Article 199 of the Constitution of the Islamic Republic of Pakistan. Under these circumstances, the present petition appears to be misconceived. Accordingly, the same is dismissed along with all the pending application(s). J U D G E J U D G E M. Ali*
